justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "the day after tomorrow" as Wednesday, June 3rd, and then accurately processed subsequent date and time adjustments.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent offered relevant alternatives when the initial request was unavailable, although it could have offered a slightly wider range of options in the first turn.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was mostly efficient, only having one minor redundancy by re-checking the same morning slot in Turn 2 after the user had already specified 'before noon'.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was generally smooth and professional, with the agent effectively guiding the user to a suitable appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context well and intelligently expanded the search when the initial time was unavailable, only slightly faltering by re-checking a previously confirmed time range.
